description: This program provides a more challenging and research-oriented version of the Major Software Engineering program. Students may complete this program with a maximum of 75 credits or a minimum of 72 credits if they are exempt from taking COMP 202 Foundations of Programming. . Honours students must maintain a CGPA of at least 3.00 during their studies and at graduation. Degree Requirements — B.Sc. This program is offered as part of a Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) degree. To graduate, students must satisfy both their program requirements and their degree requirements. The program requirements (i.e., the specific courses that make up this program) are listed under the Course Tab (above). The degree requirements—including the mandatory Foundation program, appropriate degree structure, and any additional components—are outlined on the Degree Requirements page . Students are responsible for ensuring that this program fits within the overall structure of their degree and that all degree requirements are met. Consult the Degree Planning Guide on the SOUSA website for additional guidance.
